creator: warlock@phouka.net
text:
The freebsd-x11 mailing list might be wedged.  I've sent two emails to it, they were accepted, but they haven't popped back out again or shown up on the searchable archives.  These would be a reply to my "FreeBSD 13.0-STABLE / drm-kmod / dual radeon problems" email (https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-x11/2021-August/000354.html).  

Looks like nothing new has come through there since the ~22nd (give or take time zones), but I've been getting plenty of other emails from different lists.
